workOrder.title: Show recent site access changes in Users & Access

selectionReason: Users & Access already showed current access plus safer Assign/Remove guidance, but it still did not surface the latest recorded access changes for the current school. The scoped route already wrote site_access_assignment audit rows, so adding a read-only history panel was the safest next access-trust slice.
userFacingImprovement: Site admins can review recent access assignments and removals for this school before using the existing forms.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The route still uses the existing scoped /api/site/access-assignments permission gate; no role, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility changed.
The history payload excludes free-form adminNote text and raw audit metadata such as actor role scopes.
No mutation path, auth behavior, secret handling, deployment setting, seed/reset path, or live data policy changed.

candidateSummary.decision: deferred; hosted fake-account and audit writes are not allowed in this lane

validation.notes: Full validation passed; git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Users & Access recent access changes unless data-site-access-history or the focused route/workspace coverage regresses.

ladderHandoff.evidence: Users & Access now renders recent site access changes from scoped site_access_assignment audit rows without showing admin-note text.
ladderHandoff.unlocks: The Users & Access panel now shows current access, safer action guidance, and recorded recent changes in one read-only workspace.
ladderHandoff.next: Run hosted section-level permission proof when allowed; otherwise review whether Recent Audit can open a scoped audit destination for site admins without broadening visibility.
ladderHandoff.blockers: Hosted proof needs safe fake-account/audit runtime; audit destination shape still needs visibility review; missing-submission queue rows do not exist; archive retry/regenerate needs mutation policy.
